LanguageData.Mechanent.description: A humanlike-mechanoid that utilizes a highly sophisticated subpersona core to approach a live human in its thought complexity; however, their "minds" are of a very different nature, and are incapable of emulating complex emotions.\n\nWhile they possess a degree of individuality, mechanents are not fully sentient - relying on mimicry of human behavior to appear less mechanical.
LanguageData.Mechanent.label: mechanent
LanguageData.Mechanent.tools.0.label: left fist
LanguageData.Mechanent.tools.1.label: right fist
LanguageData.Personae_.description: The avatar of an AI persona core - a fusion of archotech and bleeding-edge technology, their vessels are often analogous and strikingly identical to a live human. They're both reviled and revered by human cultures.
LanguageData.Personae_.label: persona
LanguageData.Personae_.tools.0.label: teeth
LanguageData.Personae_.tools.1.label: right fist
